caption: A person's hands work on a crafting project atop a white gridded cutting mat. The person wears a white smartwatch on their left wrist and a ring on their left ring finger. They manipulate pieces of green and brown patterned paper and a white rectangular piece. A clear acrylic stamp block is visible, bearing the text "BIRTHDAY is filled with all the Best things!". A white ink pad labeled "MEMEN" is also present on the mat. Initially, the person positions a patterned green piece over a brown background. As the sequence progresses, they adjust the placement of the patterned strips and the white rectangle. Finally, the person uses the acrylic stamp block to apply a stamp to the center of the card. A watermark reading "Amazing Jill" is visible at the bottom of the scene.
